endpoints.name: Gets languages supported by the client generator
endpoints.description: Gets languages supported by the client generator

endpoints.name: Returns options for a client library
endpoints.description: Returns options for a client library
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: Generates a client library
endpoints.description: Accepts a `GeneratorInput` options map for spec location and generation options
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{LANGUAGE}} with a real language.

endpoints.name: Downloads a pre-generated file
endpoints.description: A valid `fileId` is generated by the `/clients/{language}` or `/servers/{language}` POST operations.  The fileId code can be used just once, after which a new `fileId` will need to be requested.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FILEID}} with a real fileid.

endpoints.name: Gets languages supported by the server generator
endpoints.description: Gets languages supported by the server generator

endpoints.name: Returns options for a server framework
endpoints.description: Returns options for a server framework
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FRAMEWORK}} with a real framework.

endpoints.name: Generates a server library
endpoints.description: Accepts a `GeneratorInput` options map for spec location and generation options.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FRAMEWORK}} with a real framework.
